items.phrase: I've got some good news (for you).
items.translation: У меня есть хорошие новости (для тебя).
items.example: I've got some good news — I passed my exam!

items.phrase: I'm sorry to have to tell you, but …
items.example: I'm sorry to have to tell you, but we lost the match.
Bad news, I'm afraid — the flight has been cancelled.
You'll never guess what — I was promoted!
You've won? That's amazing! Well done!

items.phrase: I'm really sorry to hear that.
items.example: You lost your job? I'm really sorry to hear that.
Oh no, that's awful! Are you OK?
You got the job? Congratulations! I'm so pleased for you.
You passed with flying colours! You must be delighted!
